name: cwr-frontend
comment-security: Versions PINNED (no ^) to verified-good releases so a future install cannot silently pull a newer/compromised version. wallet-adapter-wallets is intentionally OMITTED — wallet-adapter-react auto-detects Wallet-Standard wallets (Phantom/Solflare/Backpack) with an empty wallets list, avoiding the huge multi-chain (Trezor/Stellar/USB/Torus) subtree. Re-verify on any bump; commit package-lock.json.
comment-overrides: Single-version the things that MATTER at runtime — React core + its types. @solana-mobile (a wallet-adapter transitive) nests react@19 / @types/react@19; two React runtimes cause invalid-hook-call bugs, so we pin the whole tree to 18. (Build-tooling transitives like yargs/commander/chalk are intentionally left alone — they never ship to the browser.)
